subject: Kibito, a tall humanoid figure with a distinctively red-toned face and long white hair, wearing an orange and white outfit, standing in an energized pose
description: A tall humanoid figure with a distinctively red-toned face and long white hair stands in an energized, slightly forward-leaning pose. The figure wears an orange tunic with a white sash. Blue-white energy radiates around the figure. The background is a bright electric blue energy field. The figure's expression is composed and determined. The distinctive facial coloring and white hair are the character's most visually prominent features.
foreground: tall figure with red face, long white hair, orange outfit, blue energy aura
